## [`NbdevLookup`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/00_utils/extlib.html#nbdevlookup) Class

Provides documentation lookup for a package.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/extlib.py#L48"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### NbdevLookup

>  NbdevLookup (modidx:Dict[str,Any]=<factory>)

*Documentation lookup for a Python package.*

Provides symbol-to-documentation-URL mapping similar to nbdev’s built-in
lookup functionality.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>

<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>modidx</td>
<td>Dict</td>
<td><factory></td>
<td>The module index dictionary (from _modidx.py ‘d’ variable).</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### generate_modidx

>  generate_modidx (package_name:str, doc_base_url:Optional[str]=None,
>                       max_depth:int=2)

*Generate a module index for an installed package.*

Inspects the package to discover public symbols and creates a
modidx-compatible dictionary.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>package_name</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>The package to index.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>doc_base_url</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Base URL for documentation. Uses KNOWN_DOC_URLS if not
specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>max_depth</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>2</td>
<td>Maximum submodule depth to scan.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>A modidx-compatible dictionary.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### save_package_index

>  save_package_index (package_name:str, modidx:Dict[str,Any])

*Save a package index to the cache.*

Creates the directory structure: - **init**.py (empty) - \_modidx.py
(the index) - \_nbdev.py (lookup helper)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>

<td>str</td>
<td>The package name.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>modidx</td>
<td>Dict</td>
<td>The module index dictionary.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Path</strong></td>
<td><strong>Path to the created directory.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### index_project_externals

>  index_project_externals (project:pathlib.Path, force:bool=False)

*Index all external libraries used by a project.*

Scans the project for imports and creates/updates indices for all
external packages.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td></td>
<td>Path to the nbdev project root.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, regenerate all indices.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘packages’, ‘indexed’, ‘failed’
lists.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

>  lookup_symbol (symbol:str, packages:Optional[List[str]]=None)

*Look up a symbol across multiple package indices.*

<cell_type>markdown</cell_type>\## Local Editable Installs

Functions for discovering and indexing local nbdev projects installed
with `pip install -e .`

>  get_local_project_cache ()

### lookup_symbol_everywhere

>  lookup_symbol_everywhere (symbol:str, packages:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                                include_local:bool=True)

*Look up a symbol in both external and local package indices.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>

</tr>

<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>

</tr>
<tr>

<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>

### lookup_local_symbol

>  lookup_local_symbol (symbol:str)

*Look up a symbol in local editable projects.*

Searches the cached local project indices for a symbol. Call
[`index_local_projects()`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/11_tools/analysis.html#index_local_projects)
first to populate the cache.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 38%" />
<col style="width: 52%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>symbol</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>The symbol to look up (e.g., ‘mypackage.module.func’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Optional</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict with ‘package’, ‘doc_url’, ‘source_file’ if
found.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/analysis.py#L726"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### index_local_projects

>  index_local_projects (include_paths:Optional[List[str]]=None,
>                            force:bool=False)

*Index all local nbdev projects (editable installs).*

Discovers editable installs from pip and indexes those that have a
`_modidx.py` (nbdev projects).

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>include_paths</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Additional paths to scan for nbdev projects.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>force</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, refresh the cache even if already indexed.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘indexed’ projects and ‘failed’
list.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/extlib.py#L577"

### discover_editable_installs

>  discover_editable_installs ()
